per_outcome.operationalization: Points earned on three in-person, proctored exams (out of 20, with possible extra credit), assessing individual understanding of macroeconomics material
Student self-reported perceptions of their understanding, measured on a scale after the second and third exams
Student self-reported perceptions of their critical thinking, measured on a scale after the second and third exams
Percentage of classes attended by each student throughout the course
